creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Committed - thanks very much to olivierd for submitting the patch, to makc and araujo for the review on behalf of the KDE team, and to rakuco and Anton for triaging/reminding.

I will mark this bug report as closed, and if someone wants to progress the qt5 port they can either re-open this bug or file a new one.
